title: Tridents Return from the Void
description: Loyalty tridents that are thrown into the void return to the player.
body:
# Tridents Return from the Void Loyalty tridents that are thrown into the void return to the player. ## Features * Loyalty tridents that are thrown into the void return to the player. * This mod may be run solely on the server (client-side installation of this mod is not required on servers with this mod installed). ## Supported Platforms Tridents Return from the Void is currently available for Fabric on Minecraft: Java Edition version 1.21 to 1.21.5. # Installation #### Prerequisites * JRE/JDK 21 * Minecraft: Java Edition version 1.21 to 1.21.5 * [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer) #### Obtaining the Projectiles Break Dripstone mod file `.jar` * Download the Projectiles Break Dripstone mod file `.jar` from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/tridentsreturnfromthevoid/versions).
#### Installing the Projectiles Break Dripstone mod file Once you have the Projectiles Break Dripstone mod file `.jar`, move it into the `mods` folder in your Fabric Loader installation folder. For more information on installing Fabric mods, check out these [Fabric Player Guides](https://docs.fabricmc.net/players/). # License Projectiles Break Dripstone is licensed under GNU LGPLv3. # Disclaimer NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
